calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
David Mendez, Esq. for the Plaintiff: V.D. Devdhara, present with Witness: Jeffrey Lal.
No appearance by the Defendant: Sandra Charleton.
Plaintiff and Witness were sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1 - Three-Day Notice----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Back Rent and Damages $733.30
Costs $195.00, for a total of $928.30
Judgment signed in open court, counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2006: DAVID G. MENDEZ, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT SANDRA CHARLETON THIS DAY.

THE MATTER IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR THIS DATE FOR THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR BY COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; THE D-206 TRIAL DATE FOR TUESDAY, OCT-10-2006 REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-218).
